TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kawbu‚Äô, title = Kawbu‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawbu‚Äô} }

S.FORM: Kawbu' Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Kawbu' a niyaro', 31 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 110 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 85% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 93 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 15% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 17 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 76%, Amis 6%, roma 2%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: kawb~b~vo~u~u ° itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u kawb~b~vo~u~u ° a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kata…¨~…ģamaanan no~u nijaro~u °
S.FORM: Kawbu' Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Kawbu' a niyaro', 31 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 110 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 85% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 93 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 15% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 17 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 76%, Amis 6%, roma 2%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: kawb~b~vo~u~u ° itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u kawb~b~vo~u~u ° a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kata…¨~…ģamaanan no~u nijaro~u °
